name: screensharing.connection
title: Screen Sharing:Connection
description: The declaration to configure a connection to a screen-sharing host.

payloadkeys.title: Unique Identifier
payloadkeys.content: A unique identifier for this connection when it's in a connection group.

payloadkeys.title: Host Name
payloadkeys.content: The host name or IP address of the Mac that hosts the screen-sharing connection.

payloadkeys.title: TCP Port
payloadkeys.content: The TCP port number on the host to initiate the connection.

payloadkeys.title: Display Configuration
payloadkeys.content: The display configuration for this connection.

subkeys.content:
The type of display for the connection, which has these allowed values:

- `Virtual1`: Create one virtual display.
- `Virtual2`: Create two virtual displays.

payloadkeys.title: Authentication Credentials Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the required credentials for this connection to authenticate with the screen-sharing server. Set the corresponding asset type to `com.apple.asset.credential.userpassword`.
